data.name: CUMBOY IN SPACE 2
data.detailed_description:
CUMBOY IN SPACE 2 is the sequel to the space epic.

In this part you will see even more exciting plot and orgasm.

In the game you will find:

- One-handed play
- Sex stories with videos and pictures
- Hot women
- Achievements that are easy to unlock
- Minimal boring scenes


Get on board the spaceship and head out to explore the expanse of sweet pussy!

data.short_description: CUMBOY IN SPACE 2 is a sequel visual novel in which you will play a male character. It is a space drama in an alternate history, where you will have hot sex with beautiful women and decide the fate of the galaxy.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 633 MB 可用空間
